description_long: This is a compact, two-story restaurant with a traditional Japanese architectural style, featuring a sloped wooden roof and white plastered walls. The front facade is adorned with a large white noren curtain bearing red Japanese characters, and a cylindrical lantern with matching text hangs to the left of the entrance. The building has a wooden balcony and a large cylindrical water tank on the upper level, adding to its authentic look. The side and rear walls are simpler, with small windows, utility pipes, and two red fire extinguishers visible. The structure sits on a raised, octagonal platform with a dark wooden trim and a beige ground surface. The overall design suggests a cozy, inviting ramen shop commonly found in urban Japanese neighborhoods.
description: A traditional Japanese ramen restaurant with a wooden roof, white walls, a noren curtain, and a hanging lantern, set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a large noren curtain, a hanging lantern, and the restaurant's signage in red Japanese characters.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals two red fire extinguishers, a small window, and the cylindrical water tank on the roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a row of closed wooden windows and a simple, unadorned wall.
description_view_3: The right side view features utility pipes, a small window, a metal box, and the side of the hanging lantern.
attribute_signage: Large white noren curtain with red Japanese characters and a cylindrical lantern with matching text, both at the front entrance.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a traditional wooden roof with exposed beams, white plastered walls, and a prominent noren curtain with red Japanese text. A cylindrical lantern hangs beside the entrance, and the base is trimmed with dark wood. The overall style is simple yet inviting, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on natural materials.
